command: echo '=== MT5 process ===' && ps aux | grep terminal64 | grep -v grep && echo '=== ALL EA logs ===' && ls -la '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Logs/' 2>/dev/null && echo '=== Terminal log full (today entries) ===' && TLOG=$(ls -t '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/logs/'*.log 2>/dev/null | head -1) && if [ -n "$TLOG" ]; then echo "File: $TLOG"; cat "$TLOG" | tr -d '\0' | grep -E '22:3[5-9]|22:4|22:5|23:' | tail -40; fi && echo '=== status.json timestamp ===' && python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Files/PropFirmBot/status.json')); print('timestamp:', d.get('timestamp','N/A'))" 2>/dev/null && echo '=== Network connections ===' && ss -tn state established 2>/dev/null | grep -v ':22 ' | head -10 && echo '=== Wine errors ===' && dmesg 2>/dev/null | grep -i 'wine\|segfault' | tail -5
